With a focus on Landscape Ecology, Leandro Cassaro stands out for his authorship of the significant work Obsidian Circuit Duo. Guided by his mentor Minh Chau Dao, he has explored various aspects of ecological interactions throughout his career. Beyond his scholarly contributions, Leandro actively participates in the Evergold Beadsmiths Union, promoting collaboration among like-minded individuals. His research receives vital funding from the Blazing Juniper Consortium, which plays an essential role in enabling his ecological explorations and artistic endeavors.
